shortDescription: Stable Diffusion generates images conditioned on text or other images as input through the diffusion process. Please refer to https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.10752 for details.

outputSchema.shortDescription: Same shape and dtype as the `sample` input. The predicted noise to facilitate the reverse diffusion (denoising) process
outputSchema.name: noise_pred

author: Please refer to the Model Card available at huggingface.co/stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0

inputSchema.shortDescription: The low resolution latent feature maps being denoised through reverse diffusion
inputSchema.name: sample

inputSchema.shortDescription: A value emitted by the associated scheduler object to condition the model on a given noise schedule
inputSchema.name: timestep

inputSchema.shortDescription: Output embeddings from the associated text_encoder model to condition to generated image on text. A maximum of 77 tokens (~40 words) are allowed. Longer text is truncated. Shorter text does not reduce computation.
inputSchema.name: encoder_hidden_states

inputSchema.shortDescription: Additional embeddings that if specified are added to the embeddings that are passed along to the UNet blocks.
inputSchema.name: time_ids

inputSchema.shortDescription: Additional embeddings from text_encoder_2 that if specified are added to the embeddings that are passed along to the UNet blocks.
inputSchema.name: text_embeds
